name: maxie
description: MAXie - a local-first AI desktop companion prototype.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer/petBrain.js && node --check renderer/petPhysics.js && node --check renderer/pet.js && node --check settings/settings.js && node --check storage/store.js && node --check ai/aiClient.js && node --check ai/ollamaClient.js && node --check ai/openAiCompatibleClient.js && node --check ai/geminiClient.js && node --check ai/personality.js && node --check utils/activeApp.js && node --check utils/systemInfo.js && node --check utils/startup.js && node --check tray/trayController.js && node --check scripts/mobile-build.js && node --check scripts/preview-server.js
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && cap sync android
scripts.mobile:open: npm run mobile:sync && cap open android
scripts.mobile:build: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease

author: MAXie Project
